title: Fix usage messages for podman image list, rm
body:
The command documented in podman-image(1) is 'rm'. This is also
the human-friendly and expected subcommand name. Due to a
limitation in Cobra, it was implemented as 'rmi'.

This PR applies a variation of the hackery in #2471: instead of
enabling an alias, we change the command name from 'rmi' to 'rm'
but only within the 'podman image' subcommand. As a usability
bonus we also amend the examples.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

comments.body: :umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #2480) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.

@edsantiago One minor change and then LGTM
Tested with my script and this leaves us with just aliases.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Are these tests hung? Should I slash-retest?
We'll see if that does it. Otherwise, they're papr, so the openshift retest commands won't work, so we generally ping the maintainers on IRC and ask them to intervene manual-like
Alright, tests actually running now, hopefully will merge soon.
